title: Health and Education Cess — AY2025-26
description: Health and Education Cess rate applicable on income tax plus surcharge. Referenced by rules as TaxTable:2024.cess.
authority: Finance Act First Schedule — Education Cess (renamed Health and Education Cess from AY2018-19)

cess.name: Health and Education Cess
cess.note: 4% H&E Cess replaced 3% Education Cess + 1% Secondary and Higher Education Cess from AY2018-19. The rate has not changed since. No deduction is allowed against cess paid.
